t_en: Strong film grain — 16mm look, coarse, documentary
Subtle grain — 35mm look, organic, not digital
t_de: Subtiles Korn — 35mm Look, organisch, nicht digital

t_en: Horizontal lens flares — sci-fi, polished cinema
t_de: Horizontale Lens Flares — Sci-Fi, polished cinema

t_en: Light backlight flares — natural, not forced
Strong edge darkening — focus center, noir feeling
t_de: Starke Randabdunkelung — focus center, noir feeling

t_en: Gentle edge darkening — barely noticeable, subtle depth
t_de: Sanfte Randabdunkelung — barely noticeable, subtle depth

t_en: Color fringing at contrast edges — vintage lens character
t_de: Farbsäume an Kontrastkanten — vintage lens character

t_en: Filmic glow around bright spots — Kodak warmth
t_de: Filmisches Leuchten um helle Stellen — Kodak warmth

t_en: Gentle shimmer on highlights — ethereal, romantic
t_de: Sanfter Schimmer auf Lichtern — ethereal, romantic

t_en: Motion blur during movement — energy, speed
